body: Implemented ai_chi/bus/transports/file_transport.py with safe stream-name validation, append-only JSONL writes, required 7-field envelope checks, MMessage.to_dict compatibility, ordered reads, and contextual FileTransportError diagnostics. Expanded ai_chi/tests/test_file_transport.py to 8 meaningful tests. Updated _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/blueprints/TRANSPORT_PERSISTENCE_ADR.md to ACCEPTED FOR LOCAL P1 JSONL IMPLEMENTATION, updated _MODEL_TRINITY/bridge/CODEX_TRANSPORT_HANDOFF.md, logged _MODEL_TRINITY/CONFIG_CHANGE_LOG.md, and created _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CODEX_FILE_BACKED_SIGMA_TRANSPORT_2026-06-13.md. Verification: py_compile OK; file transport tests 8 OK; file+nats transport tests 13 OK; axiom floor True; full ai_chi suite 331 OK. Boundary preserved: no installs, no app config changes, no credentials, no services, no ICP/on-chain writes, no provider calls, no deployment.
constraints: Do not treat JSONL P1 as high-concurrency broker; future runtime wiring needs separate approval and tests.
forbidden_actions: No installs, credentials, app config mutation, service writes, ICP/on-chain writes, deployment, spending, or hidden listeners.
requested_output: Builder-Scout ack or next proposal only; runtime wiring remains separate stop-gated promotion.
summary: Codex implemented Antigravity's JSONL FileBackedSigmaTransport scaffold and verified the repo at 331 tests OK.
